violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, mixer, and equipment on clean storage rack) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler and hallway. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer, mixer, can opener base, and freezer door handles have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The wall at the bottom of the basement stairs to the storage area is in poor repair, with paint flaking from the wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2026

The TV wall, kitchen and basement floor has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The walk in cooler fan cover has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The kitchen hand sink has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
